---
name: Agent task (spec-first)
about: Spec and plan before implementation work begins
title: ""
labels: []
assignees: ""
---

## Title

## Problem
- What’s broken / what we want / why now
- Impact (user/system/business impact)

## Context
- Relevant repo areas / constraints / links / prior decisions
- Current behavior vs expected behavior

## Proposed approach
- High-level steps
- Expected key files/components
- Non-goals to avoid overbuild
- Branch type recommendation (`feat`/`fix`/etc.) with reason

## Acceptance criteria
- Bullet list; testable outcomes

## Out of scope
- Explicit exclusions

## Risks / unknowns
- Anything that could invalidate the approach

## Implementation notes (optional but preferred)
- Dependencies
- Migration notes
- Rollout notes
- Verification/test plan
